title: Video Generation
description: Generate videos from text prompts or images using multiple AI providers. Supports Grok, Sora, and Veo models.

video_grok.title: Grok Imagine Video
video_grok.description: Generate videos using xAI Grok Imagine Video. $0.05/sec, max 15s, 720p.

video_sora.title: Sora 2
video_sora.description: Generate videos using OpenAI Sora 2. $0.10/sec, max 20s, 720p.

video_sora_pro.title: Sora 2 Pro
video_sora_pro.description: Generate high-quality videos using OpenAI Sora 2 Pro. $0.30/sec, max 20s, up to 1080p.

video_veo.title: Veo 3.1
video_veo.description: Generate videos with audio using Google Veo 3.1. $0.40/sec, max 8s, 1080p.

video_veo_fast.title: Veo 3.1 Fast
video_veo_fast.description: Generate videos with audio using Google Veo 3.1 Fast. $0.15/sec, max 8s, 1080p.

states.description: States for each video generation skill (disabled, public, or private)
